'''[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] Omin L'Loxx''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] recon trooper in the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom]] and was the partner of [[Jamur Nath]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Although Jamur was killed, L'Loxx went on to serve in the later battle, in a recon team with [[Grudo]], [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Ram Raders]], and [[Private/Legends|Private]] [[Slane Vick]].
